meta.name: Keepfall Design Tokens
meta.note: Sunset-leaning brand: warm oranges, dusk purples, deep blues. Painterly but readable at small mobile sizes. No aggressive red alarm styling. No exclamation points in any string token.

base.comment: Dark plum/indigo brand background (matches master PDF).

deep.comment: Deepest plum, used behind painterly art and modal scrims.

raised.comment: One step up from bg for layered dusk surfaces.

1.comment: Default card/panel surface on dusk background.

overlayScrim.comment: Atmospheric fog scrim behind sheets. Calm, low-contrast.

indigo.comment: Brand blue section accent. Primary interactive color.

magenta.comment: Brand magenta-pink accent (matches master PDF accent).

orange.comment: Warm sunset orange for painterly rim light and warm CTAs.

duskPurple.comment: Dusk purple mid-tone for gradients and fog.

deepBlue.comment: Deep blue horizon, grounds the sunset gradient.

stoneGold.comment: Stone — soft earned currency. Warm gold, never garish.

shardViolet.comment: Shards — premium IAP currency. Calm violet.

champion.comment: Crimson + gold. Win-condition unit. Crimson is a UNIT identity color, never a system alarm.

success.comment: Calm teal-green confirmation. Used for valid deck, claim done.

caution.comment: Soft amber for gentle correction (deck validator). NOT red. NOT an alarm.

state.comment: There is intentionally NO aggressive red 'error/alarm' token. Corrections are amber and second-person. Defeat is neutral, never punishing red.

primary.comment: Primary text on dusk surfaces. Warm off-white.

onAccent.comment: Dark text placed on gold/amber bright fills.

spacing.comment: 4pt base scale. Mobile-first; touch targets never below 44pt.

radius.comment: Pill is used for the currency wallet and primary CTAs. Cards use lg.

elevation.comment: Soft, low-contrast shadows tuned for the painterly dusk theme. No hard black drop shadows.

glowAccent.comment: Reserved for ready-to-claim tile rim glow only. Calm pulse, never a flash.

glowReady.comment: Stone-gold glow on a tile at cap, signalling ready-to-claim.

ui.comment: Humanist sans for all UI body, labels, numerals.

display.comment: Display weight for titles, screen headers, key-art-adjacent text. Painterly, editorial feel.

numeric.comment: Tabular numerals for currency, elixir, timers — prevents jitter as values change.

scale.comment: Sizes in pt. lineHeight unitless. Mobile-tuned; smallest readable label is caption=12.

body.comment: Default body. Minimum size for sustained reading.

motion.comment: Calm, short, purposeful. No confetti. No celebratory bounce. Claim is silent. No countdown-pressure animation. No FOMO modal entrance.

duration.comment: ambient is for the slow, looping tile-fill shimmer and ready-to-claim glow pulse only.

easing.comment: No spring/overshoot easings are defined on purpose — overshoot reads as celebratory bounce, which is banned for purchases and claims.

reducedMotion.comment: When the OS requests reduced motion: disable all ambient loops and tile shimmer, replace transitions with cross-fade at duration.fast.
